Off Calendar Aug-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: STEPHEN L. COLLIER, ESQ. for Holli P. Thier plaintiff and moving party; ALEX M. WEYAND, ESQ. for C. Cournale & Co., defendant and opposing party.

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED as MODIFIED:
PLAINTIFF HOLLI THIER, JACQUELINE THIER and BENJAMIN THIER's Motion For Protective Order is granted in part and denied in part.

As the motion seeks an order limiting the continuing deposition of Plaintiff Holli Thier, the motion is granted as the court orders that Plaintiff shall submit to one additional day of deposition, morning and afternoon sessions, to complete questioning by all defendants.

As the motion seeks an order barring the medical examinations of all Plaintiff, the motion is denied.

As the motion seeks an order barring the production of documents pursuant to Defendant's subpoenas, the motion is granted. Each of the subpoenas names the Weyand Law Firm as the deposition officer in violation of C.C.P. Section 2020.420.

The motion is denied as it seeks to prevent the deposition of plaintiff's psychologist, Dr. Janet Waner.

The motion is granted in part as Plaintiff seeks a protective order which relieves Plaintiffs from responding to Requests For Admission, Set Two, with the accompanying Form Interrogatory 17.1 and Special Interrogatories, Set Two, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set Two, as they are excessive and unduly burdensome. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to the supplemental interrogatory and supplemental request for production of documents on or before August 23, 2010. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. CSR: Sheila Arceno, 415-274-9977
